task.title: Exporting a z/OS project
task.shortdesc: You can export a z/OS project to share with other users.

taskbody.prereq: You must have a workstation-based z/OS project in the view. This action is not valid for local or host-based projects.z/OS UNIX subprojects use a different mechanism for export and are not included in an exported z/OS project. For more information about exporting z/OS UNIX subprojects, see the related topics.

steps.stepsection: To export a z/OS project, do these steps:

step.cmd: Select a z/OS project in the view.
Select Export z/OS Project from the menu.
Browse to the folder where you want to save the project archive file and type a file name in the File name field.

taskbody.postreq: Now you can share the archive file location with other users who can import the project into their workspaces.
